name: Attachment
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Attachment helper with Effect Schema state, size, orientation, and media variants, local part renderers, dialog-trigger examples, a FileDrop-backed attachment workflow demo, and deterministic inline SVG example icons.

registry.reason: Attachment actions reuse the local shadcn Button class helper.
Attachment trigger examples compose the local shadcn Dialog helper.
Attachment uploading examples compose the local shadcn Spinner helper.
Attachment replaces CVA and merge-props helpers with local class canonicalization.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for state, size, orientation, and media variants.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provides the headless FileDrop Submodel used by the attachment workflow demo for drag state and file-arrival handling.

development.reason: Origin mergeProps usage is replaced by explicit Foldkit attribute construction.
Origin useRender support is represented by Foldkit toView-style helpers.
Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure local class maps.
Origin icon package usage is replaced by deterministic inline SVGs in the local examples.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: AttachmentDemo
examples.description: Attachment demo with image rows, upload progress, and file actions.
examples.distinguishes: Attachment demo with image rows, upload progress, and file actions.

examples.title: AttachmentGroupDemo
examples.description: Scrollable attachment group with multiple file types and remove actions.
examples.distinguishes: Scrollable attachment group with multiple file types and remove actions.

examples.title: AttachmentImage
examples.description: Image attachments with overlay preview triggers and external links.
examples.distinguishes: Image attachments with overlay preview triggers and external links.

examples.title: AttachmentSizes
examples.description: Default, small, and extra-small attachment rows.
examples.distinguishes: Default, small, and extra-small attachment rows.

examples.title: AttachmentStates
examples.description: Idle, uploading, processing, error, and done attachment states.
examples.distinguishes: Idle, uploading, processing, error, and done attachment states.

examples.title: AttachmentWorkflowDemo
examples.description: FileDrop-backed attachment workflow with accepted file rows.
examples.distinguishes: FileDrop-backed attachment workflow with accepted file rows.

examples.title: AttachmentTriggerDemo
examples.description: Attachment preview trigger integrated with a dialog-backed preview.
examples.distinguishes: Attachment preview trigger integrated with a dialog-backed preview.

deviations.summary: The installable examples use local inline SVG icons instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local inline SVGs preserve the rendered footprint needed by the attachment demos.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Attachment helper with Effect Schema state, size, orientation, and media variants, local part renderers, dialog-trigger examples, a FileDrop-backed attachment workflow demo, and deterministic inline SVG example icons.
